system.notes:
Abilities

  • Rat Master: Using a Complex Action, the devil rat can telepathically control the behavior of up to 30 rats within 100m of it, directing them to take whatever actions it wishes. This power is a magical effect with a Force equal to the devil rat’s

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Low-Light
  • Devil rats are immune to toxins and diseases.:
  • Aversion to Sunlight: While in natural sunlight, a
  • devil rat suffers Liability on all tests.:
